description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit constructed from black plastic or metal, featuring four open shelves. The shelves are populated with several brown cardboard boxes of varying sizes, some stacked and some placed individually. The frame is robust and industrial, with thick vertical supports and slatted horizontal shelves, making it suitable for storage in garages, warehouses, or utility rooms. The sides of the unit are solid, providing structural support but no additional access. The open front and back allow for easy placement and retrieval of items, while the overall design is utilitarian and functional. The object is designed to be freestanding and can accommodate a variety of storage needs in urban environments.
description: A tall, black shelving unit with four open shelves, holding several brown cardboard boxes. Its sturdy, industrial design is ideal for storage in garages or utility spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing four shelves with multiple brown cardboard boxes arranged on them.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat black side panel with no visible shelves or contents.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, showing the open shelves and boxes from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing a solid black panel with no visible shelves or contents.
